spaceflight.title: Live coverage: SpaceX to launch 24 Starlink satellites on Falcon 9 rocket from Vandenberg SFB
spaceflight.summary: The Starlink 17-37 mission will fly on the 60th Falcon 9 rocket launched in 2026. Liftoff from pad 4E at Vandenberg Space Force Base is scheduled for 7:50 a.m. PDT (10:50 a.m. EDT / 1450 UTC).

spaceflight.title: A Full Moon Checkup
spaceflight.summary: Once a month during the full Moon, Landsat 9 turns from Earth to image the lunar surface, helping keep the spacecraft’s data accurate and consistent.
